title: Enhancing User Engagement: The Role of Gamification

summary: Shows gamification boosts engagement by satisfying competence, autonomy, and relatedness.

author: Koneti
summary: Case study evidence from Duolingo and Starbucks showing gamification pathways to retention.

author: Li et al.
summary: Immersion, achievement, and social interaction mediate engagement to loyalty.

title: Gamification and Customer Experience in Online Retail
author: Tyagi
summary: Gamification positively influences online shopper motivation and retention.

title: Gamification in Marketing: A Bibliometric Review
author: Santos et al.
summary: Analyzes trends and key themes from 114 published articles on gamification in marketing.

author: Habachi
summary: Game-based experiences in sports drive loyalty and behavioral change.

author: Altmeyer et al.
summary: Tailored gamification designs significantly increase long-term participation.

author: Mogavi et al.
summary: Explores the downsides of gamification when misaligned with user goals.

author: Jack et al.
summary: Evaluates impact of gamification on student motivation in statistics courses.

author: Osipov et al.
summary: Shows connection between gamification and retention via K-growth metric.

title: Octalysis Framework

summary: The eight core drives of gamified motivation.

title: Game-Based Marketing

summary: Foundational concepts in marketing through gamification.

summary: Real brand examples showing gamified loyalty mechanics.

author: OpenLoyalty
summary: Shows how engagement and retention metrics improve with gamified loyalty.
